title: eTuitionBD
desc: A full stack tuition management website. With different type of roles. Like Admin, Teacher, Student. Roles of different user can do different things. Admin can do everything. Teacher can manage their students. Student can find teachers and manage their tuitions.

challenges.title: Complex Role Management
challenges.desc: Implementing secure and isolated routing for Admins, Teachers, and Students securely without tight coupling.

challenges.title: Data Synchronization
challenges.desc: Ensuring real-time updates across multiple active sessions to prevent booking conflicts.

futurePlans.title: Integrated Payment Gateway
futurePlans.desc: Adding seamless automated subscription and tuition fee management.

futurePlans.title: Live Video Classes
futurePlans.desc: Native WebRTC classroom environments for remote sessions.

title: ecoTrack
desc: An website for managing a community of eco-friendly people. Where they can share their eco-friendly activities and inspire others.

challenges.title: Social Feed Algorithm
challenges.desc: Designing a lightweight activity sorting algorithm that naturally ranks highly-engaged tracking metrics locally.

futurePlans.title: Carbon Footprint Calculator
futurePlans.desc: Dynamically calculating emission saves based on user activity logging.

title: Skill Swap
desc: A basic website for sharing skills with others

challenges.title: Realtime Matchmaking
challenges.desc: Building custom pairing algorithms connecting mutually beneficial skill offerings quickly.

futurePlans.title: In-App Messaging natively
futurePlans.desc: Firebase-backed direct chat layer between paired users.

title: Care BD
desc: A modern, comprehensive medical and care service booking platform. It allows users to browse medical services, specialized care courses, and book appointments seamlessly. The application features a robust authentication system, real-time database integration, and a beautiful responsive UI.

challenges.title: Secure Service Booking
challenges.desc: Building an end-to-end booking flow allowing users to schedule medical and care services reliably with real-time updates.

challenges.title: Automated Notifications
challenges.desc: Integrating automated email confirmations using Nodemailer and React Email for immediate booking feedback.

futurePlans.title: Advanced Patient Records
futurePlans.desc: Implementing a comprehensive system to track patient medical histories securely.

futurePlans.title: Payment Gateway Integration
futurePlans.desc: Adding seamless automated service fee management and invoicing directly within the app.
